title: 8 Herbal Tinctures For Neuritis
description: Zingiber officinale tinctures contains bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain in the nerves. They also have antioxidant properties that protect the nerves from damage caused by free radicals. The gingerols and shogaols in Zingiber officinale tinctures have a warming effect that increases blood flow to the affected areas, which helps to relieve neuritis symptoms.
